section.title: History
section.text: Patient has long-standing hypertension, diabetes, and prior cardiac events. Repeated episodes of chest pain radiating to left arm. Family history of heart disease. Lifestyle: sedentary, high cholesterol diet.

section.title: Medications
section.text: Aspirin, Metformin, Atorvastatin, Beta blockers. Long-term adherence issues noted.

section.title: Lab Results
section.text: LDL: 180 mg/dL HDL: 35 mg/dL Triglycerides: 250 mg/dL HbA1c: 8.2%

section.title: Assessment
section.text: High cardiovascular risk. Needs aggressive treatment.

section.title: Follow-up
section.text: Follow-up visits show gradual improvement but inconsistent medication adherence.
